careers.heroTitle: Build the future of golf retail with us
careers.heroLead: We are a small, focused team obsessed with product quality, honest merchandising, and tools that help golfers shop with confidence.
careers.blockP1: Every release here touches real customers—sorting filters, checkout flows, live chat, and AI assistants that answer sizing and shaft questions. You will see your work in production quickly.
careers.blockP2: We value clear writing, accessibility, multilingual UX, and a storefront that feels as polished in dark mode as it does in light mode.
careers.card1Body: End-to-end responsibility for your area—whether that is merchandising ops, frontend UX, or customer success playbooks.
careers.card2Body: We prefer a small set of well-executed features over noisy dashboards that never ship.
careers.card3Body: Peak seasons happen, but we plan sprints so the team can recover between major golf holidays.
careers.rolesHint: These are representative openings. Reach out from your account so we can route you to the right hiring lead.
careers.role1Desc: Curate launches, tighten PDP copy, and coordinate imagery so every club and ball tells a consistent story.
careers.role2Desc: Answer chat escalations, coach golfers through returns, and feed insights back to product and merchandising.
careers.role3Desc: Own the Vite + React storefront, performance budgets, and accessibility alongside our NestJS GraphQL stack.
careers.ctaTitle: Tell us how you would contribute
careers.ctaLead: Send a note from your GreenLinks account—we read every message and reply when there is a clear match.

press.heroTitle: Facts, fonts, and photos for accurate coverage
press.heroLead: Welcome to the GreenLinks press hub—boilerplate, story angles, and the right contacts for product, partnerships, and leadership quotes.
press.kitLi1: Wordmark and color guidance: primary greens anchored to #22c55e with gold accents for campaign badges.
press.kitLi2: Company boilerplate: specialty e-commerce retailer focused on curated golf equipment and multilingual storefront experiences.
press.kitLi3: Product imagery: high-resolution lifestyle and pack shots available on request for feature coverage.
press.n1Body: GreenLinks pairs human-guided chat with model-assisted answers so golfers can compare shafts, lofts, and ball constructions faster.
press.n2Body: English, Korean, and Uzbek locales ship with the same components, RTL-safe spacing, and shared design tokens.
press.n3Body: The team highlights on-course testing feedback when choosing which bags, shoes, and training aids stay in the core catalog.
press.inquiryBody: Please reach through your verified GreenLinks account or the contact path on My page. Include your outlet, deadline, and whether you need executive commentary.
press.ctaTitle: Need a data point or quote?
press.ctaLead: We respond fastest to requests that include story context and publication timing.

blog.heroLead: Editorial notes from the GreenLinks team—how we think about fittings, seasonal drops, and the gear that earns a spot in your bag.
blog.introBody: Deep dives are written by merchandisers and players who actually test product. Expect practical advice, not generic listicles.
blog.p1Title: How we shortlist drivers for mid-handicap swings
blog.p1Excerpt: Shaft pairing, adjustable hosels, and why we favor certain face materials when building our featured driver assortment.
blog.p2Title: Sale season playbook: reading real discounts
blog.p2Excerpt: A buyer’s checklist for spotting meaningful markdowns versus cosmetic price moves during holiday promos.
blog.p3Title: Walking 18 with a Sunday bag: what we learned
blog.p3Excerpt: Weight distribution, strap geometry, and the accessories that matter when you trim down to essentials.
blog.ctaLead: Jump into clubs, balls, or current promotions—the blog and catalog share the same product truths.

partners.heroTitle: Partner with a golf-native commerce team
partners.heroLead: From OEM launches to course networks and creator programs, we collaborate with partners who care about product truth and long-term customer trust.
partners.pillar1Body: Coordinated PDP storytelling, hero placements, and launch analytics across email, onsite modules, and chat-assisted discovery.
partners.pillar2Body: Pop-up fittings, demo days, and map integrations that connect online shoppers with trusted retail and teaching pros.
partners.pillar3Body: Carefully scoped integrations—inventory signals, attribution, and privacy-respecting personalization—for teams that respect golfer consent.
partners.step1: Introduce your organization, audience, and what success looks like in the first 90 days.
partners.step2: We review channel fit, compliance, and creative needs with merchandising plus operations leads.
partners.step3: Pilot programs ship with clear KPIs before any wide-scale rollout.
partners.ctaLead: Use My page to share a short brief—we reply with next steps and the right point of contact.

affiliates.heroTitle: Earn by recommending gear golfers actually use
affiliates.heroLead: Our affiliate program rewards authentic content—reviews, lessons, travelogues—when your audience shops GreenLinks through your tracked links.
affiliates.b1: Competitive commissions on qualifying sales with transparent reporting in your partner dashboard.
affiliates.b2: Fresh creative, seasonal banners, and deep links into curated collections—not just homepage referrals.
affiliates.b3: Dedicated point of contact for monetizable campaigns and compliance questions.
affiliates.b4: Early access to merchandising calendars so you can plan content around real drops.
affiliates.how1: Apply via My page with your channel URLs, audience size, and sample content highlights.
affiliates.how2: Our partnerships team reviews fit, brand safety, and disclosure practices.
affiliates.how3: Approved partners receive tracking parameters, policy docs, and launch checklists.
affiliates.legalNote: Participation requires adherence to our publisher guidelines and regional advertising rules. Refer to our Terms of Service for eligibility.
affiliates.ctaLead: We onboard new partners on a rolling basis—expect a response within several business days.
